title: Solana NFT Collection Stats
description: Fetch aggregated on-chain stats for any Solana NFT collection by collection address — floor price in SOL and USD, 24h trading volume, total unique holder count, total listed supply, and top 5 holder wallets ranked by number of items. Pair with GoldRush's real-time NFT transfer stream to track when floor listings are scooped. Build a collection monitor that fires an alert when floor drops below your target price, volume spikes above 2x average, or holder concentration increases.
useCase: Build a Solana NFT collection monitor that tracks floor price, 24h volume, and holder concentration and fires alerts when key thresholds are crossed.

keyParams.tokenAddress: The collection mint address or verified collection address to fetch stats for
keyParams.address: Wallet address to check for NFTs from this collection
keyParams.page_size: Number of top holders to return for concentration analysis
keyParams.no_spam: Filter out spam NFT collections from holder queries
